nodes.name: Webhook — Receive WhatsApp Message
nodes.notes: Receives POST requests from WhatsApp API or website form. Payload expected: { from, body, timestamp }

nodes.name: Set — Normalize Input
nodes.notes: Extracts phone number and message text from WhatsApp API payload.

nodes.name: Code — Parse Intent
nodes.notes: Parses the message for check-in date, check-out date, and guest count. Sets hasMissingInfo=true if any field is absent.

nodes.name: IF — Missing Info?
nodes.notes: Routes to ask-question branch if check-in, check-out, or guest count is missing.

assignments.name: replyMessage
assignments.value:
=Halo! 👋 Terima kasih sudah menghubungi kami.

Untuk membantu Anda, kami butuh informasi berikut:
✅ Tanggal check-in
✅ Tanggal check-out
✅ Jumlah tamu

Contoh: Check-in 10 Juli, check-out 15 Juli, 4 orang.

Silakan balas dengan detail tersebut ya!

nodes.name: Set — Ask Missing Info Message
nodes.notes: Builds a friendly WhatsApp message asking for the missing booking details.

nodes.name: HTTP — Send Ask-Info WhatsApp Reply
nodes.notes: Sends the missing-info question back to the guest via WhatsApp Cloud API. Uses env vars: WHATSAPP_PHONE_NUMBER_ID, WHATSAPP_ACCESS_TOKEN.

nodes.name: Google Sheets — Create / Update Lead
nodes.notes: Upserts the lead record in Google Sheets. Uses env var: GOOGLE_SHEET_ID. Sheet name: Leads.

nodes.name: HTTP — Check Availability
nodes.notes: Calls your calendar/PMS API to check if the requested dates are available. Replace URL with your actual API. Env var: CALENDAR_API_KEY, PROPERTY_ID.

nodes.name: Code — Pricing Logic
nodes.notes: Calculates price based on nights and season. Adjust BASE_RATE_PER_NIGHT and HIGH_SEASON_MONTHS to match your property pricing.

nodes.name: HTTP — Send Quotation via WhatsApp
nodes.notes: Sends the final quotation (or unavailability notice) to the guest via WhatsApp Cloud API.

nodes.name: Google Sheets — Update Lead Status to Quoted
nodes.notes: Updates the lead's status to 'quoted' and records the quoted price and timestamp in Google Sheets.

nodes.name: Webhook Response — 200 OK
nodes.notes: Returns a 200 OK response to the WhatsApp API to acknowledge receipt of the webhook.

main.node: Google Sheets — Update Lead Status to Quoted

meta.description: Receives WhatsApp inquiries, parses intent, saves lead to Google Sheets, checks availability, generates pricing, and sends quotation. Required env vars: WHATSAPP_PHONE_NUMBER_ID, WHATSAPP_ACCESS_TOKEN, GOOGLE_SHEET_ID, CALENDAR_API_KEY, PROPERTY_ID.
